content.en:
Ye Tian did not inform the Yun Zi Divine Maiden about his cultivation into a great god arithmetic, but continued to cultivate, preparing to wait for his strength to improve again before informing the Yun Zi Divine Maiden.

In the blink of an eye, another few hundred years have passed.

At this moment, Ye Tian had already perfected all the peerless learning, and this was the end of the retreat.

Subsequently, Ye Tian went to the Yunzi Divine Maiden and told the other party that he had practiced the arithmetic of the Great God.

When the Yunzi Divine Maiden learned about it, she was immediately surprised: "Ten Thousand Laws Daozi has a high talent, and in such a short period of time, he has cultivated a Chaos Divine Power, even if the Divine General level cannot exert the power of the Chaos Divine Power, it is enough to exert the terrifying power." Ten Thousand Laws, if you're ready, let's go!"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently, Ye Tian and the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden left, but the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden's Protector Heavenly Monarch followed, protecting the safety of the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden, at least until the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden entered the forbidden land, she would always follow.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian and Yun Zi Divine Maiden to arrive at their destination.

"This is the forbidden place!"

The Cloud Purple Priestess pointed to a planet in front of her and said.

Although most of the universe is a starry continent, there are still some planets, and these planets 047 are very extraordinary, and they are all extremely huge.

The planet in front of us is very large, with a radius of at least 100 billion kilometers, like a huge object standing in the starry sky.

The entire planet is a forbidden land, no one at the god general level dares to enter, and the heavenly monarch level can only break through on the periphery, and once it goes deeper, it will definitely die.

"Wanfa Daozi, please use the Great God Arithmetic to deduce, will we die and be lifeless when we enter this time?"

The Great God Arithmetic is indeed inferior to the real Destiny Divine Power in terms of calculating fate and danger, but it is much stronger in terms of details, such as calculating where the killing array is safe, and the Great Divine Power of Destiny is useless.

The Great Divine Power of Fate can only give you a general direction, but the Great God Arithmetic is specific to a certain point, but the Great God Arithmetic cannot let Ye Tian know if he can live if he enters the forbidden land this time.

However, it is still possible to calculate whether you are dead or dead.

Immediately, Ye Tian began to perform the Great God Arithmetic.

In an instant, the rules of the great god's arithmetic appeared on his body, and his eyes showed countless data rules, calculating the safety of this trip.

Soon, Ye Tian's calculation ended.

"It's dangerous, but it's not dangerous!"

Leaf (CBCC) Heavenly Dao.

Of course, this is estimated to be the case of him entering, if the Yunzi Divine Maiden enters alone, it will be ten deaths.

"Then everything depends on the Ten Thousand Laws!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden said.

"No problem!" Ye Tian said confidently.

On the side, the Purple Shirt Heavenly Monarch, the protector of the Cloud Purple Goddess, said, "Your Highness, do you want me to go in with you, it's too dangerous for you to go in." "

"No!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden hurriedly said: "You can't, this forbidden place is very dangerous, the stronger the strong person who can enter, the more dangerous it is, once you enter, it is easy to cause unnecessary danger, even if the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi has the Great God Arithmetic, but he can only be regarded as the prototype of the chaotic magic power of the Great God Arithmetic, and the cultivation is not enough, it is difficult to calculate more, I don't want any accidents." Therefore, it is best for two people to go in."

"Okay!"

The purple-shirted Heavenly Monarch nodded secretly and stopped persuading.

......

Ye Tian and Yun Zi Divine Maiden did not enter the planet immediately, but were looking for the safest entrance that they could enter.

The entire planet is a forbidden land, and the invisible killing array is too terrifying, if they enter at will, with their seven-star god general-level strength, I am afraid they will have to be injured from the beginning.

"Here, Yun Zi Divine Maiden, let's go in from here, and after ten seconds, the killing array here is the weakest. "

Ye Tian pointed to a road.

"Good!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden nodded, there was no nonsense, and she completely obeyed Ye Tian's arrangement.

Ten seconds later.

Ye Tian and the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden entered the forbidden land from here.

Ye Tian has been turning on the Great God Arithmetic, and almost every step has been calculated.

As the two of them continued to penetrate deeper into the forbidden land, all kinds of attacks came, but because they were taking the safest route, none of these attacks could threaten Ye Tian and Yun Zi Divine Maiden.

Time passed little by little, and the two gradually came to the core area of the forbidden land.

At this time, the two of them were still not in any danger, and they were not injured at all.

At this time, the Yun Zi Divine Maiden truly realized how terrifying Ye Tian's Great God Arithmetic was.

In fact, before that, she also found some god generals in the God of War Tower, and several of them were still god generals who took the road of fate and the road of deduction, but one by one they were still dying in the forbidden land.

But now, they have penetrated into the forbidden land, but there is still no danger.

She didn't think that the forbidden land was really safe, but Ye Tian was too powerful, so she didn't encounter any danger.

"It is worthy of the great god arithmetic, countless Tianjiao in the chaos have not been practiced, and even my master said that he can't help me practice the great god arithmetic, but the ten thousand laws and Taozi have been practiced, how did he get the divine arithmetic talent?"

The Yun Zi Divine Maiden was curious, but she didn't dig deeper.

Everyone has their own experiences, if Ye Tian doesn't say it, she naturally can't know, and there is no need to know.

"It's a little dangerous next, Yun Zi Divine Maiden, I need to calculate with all my strength, you are responsible for protecting!"

Ye Tiandao.

In fact, he can also open the Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power and the Great Immortal Technique, under the protection here, it is almost impossible to encounter danger, but he will not expose the Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power, isn't that stupid?

If you take advantage of this opportunity to be able to spy on the strength of the Cloud Purple Goddess, it would be good.

"Good!"

The Cloud Purple Priestess nodded, and she agreed.

Rumble!!!

A purple flame suddenly appeared, and at this time, the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden cast a certain kind of ice system divine power, enveloping her and Ye Tian.

"The Ice Crystal Great Divine Power ranked 288th is an Ice Defense Great Divine Power!"

Ye Tianxin said.

With the great magical power of the Ice Crystal, the two of them crossed the purple flame area unharmed.

Soon, the two of them entered a desert again, and infinite gravel attacked, each grain of gravel defended against a world bombardment, and the attack power was extremely terrifying, even enough to pose a threat to the ordinary seven-star gods.

So much sand and gravel is enough to wipe out the average seven-star late-stage god general.

Seeing this scene, the Yunzi Priestess said, "Wanfa Daozi, did your great god arithmetic miscalculate, how can we enter such an area?"

"That's right, it's the safest route around, and if you don't go in, you'll have to go back. Besides, it won't be difficult to cross this area with your strength!" Ye Tiandao.

At this time, the Yun Zi Divine Maiden did not dare to slack off, and hurriedly cast a more powerful defensive supernatural power.

"Great Ice Realm Technique!"

Bang!!!

A huge ice realm blocked the gravel, and took Ye Tian and her through the area quickly.

Ye Tian knew the Great Ice Realm Technique, which was the top 100 of the three thousand Great Divine Powers, ranking 41st among the Great Divine Powers, and the power was indeed very powerful, and it was the Great Divine Power Technique of the top few defensive Divine Powers. _

To see the ununderlined version of the novel, please download Fei Lu Novel A
